name: Fashion Tour Simulator
author: Poki
description: Fashion Tour Simulator is a fashion game where you travel the world as a top stylist creating stunning runway looks! Dress up supermodels with dazzling outfits, stylish accessories, and fabulous makeovers as you compete on catwalks in iconic locations around the globe. Show off your creativity, impress the judges, earn votes, and climb the ranks to become a true fashion legend. Ready to rule the runway and let your style shine? How to play Fashion Tour Simulator? Click or tap to make the choice. Who created Fashion Tour Simulator? Fashion Tour Simulator is created by Go Panda Games.
